valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Mon 29 Jun 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Tue 30 Jun 2026
general_synopsis: Atlantic low 1004 moving rather quickly northeast, expected just west of north Shannon 1008 by 1800 Monday. New high expected Thames 1026 by same time. Low north Bailey 990 losing its identity
